post_copy_actions: Update package.json repository to atomicstrata/atomicmemory with directory plugins/openclaw.
Update package.json homepage and bugs URLs to the monorepo issue tracker.
Confirm openclaw.plugin.json points at the new monorepo install paths if it references repo URLs.
Run npm pack --dry-run --json and reconcile the published file list against this allowlist.
Verify lock-step plugin version still matches sibling plugins after monorepo workspace install.
notes: openclaw.plugin.json is the host manifest and ships in the published tarball.
